zh.lifeSummary: 當James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond於1331年10月4日出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼時，他的父親James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond26歲，母親Eleanor de Bohun26歲。他於1346年5月15日與Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond在愛爾蘭庫迪 本 馮 克羅斯 本 迪拉利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1376年被列為lord justice。他去世於1382年10月18日在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼可諾可托福黑享年51歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼聖 卡尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond于1331年10月4日出生在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼时，他的父亲James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond26岁，母亲Eleanor de Bohun26岁。他于1346年5月15日与Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond在爱尔兰庫迪 本 馮 克羅斯 本 迪拉利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1376年被列为lord justice。他去世于1382年10月18日在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼可諾可托福黑享年51岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼聖 卡尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond was born on 4 October 1331, in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland, his father, James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond, was 26 and his mother, Eleanor de Bohun, was 26. He married Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond on 15 May 1346, in County of the Cross of Tipperary, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. In 1376, at the age of 44, his occupation is listed as lord justice. He died on 18 October 1382, in Knocktopher, County Kilkenny, Ireland, at the age of 51, and was buried in St. Canice, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond est né le 4 octobre 1331, à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande, son père, James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Bohun, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond le 15 mai 1346, à County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. En 1376, à l’âge de 44 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lord justice. Il est décédé le 18 octobre 1382, à Knocktopher, County Kilkenny, Irlande, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à St. Canice, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond am 4. Oktober 1331 in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond 26 und seine Mutter Eleanor de Bohun 26. Er hat am 15. Mai 1346 in County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irland Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1376, als er 44 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lord justice aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. Oktober 1382 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Knocktopher, County Kilkenny, Irland und wurde in St. Canice, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond è nato il il 4 ottobre 1331 nel Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, il suo padre, James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor de Bohun, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond il 15 maggio 1346, nel County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1376, all'età di 44 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord justice. Morì il 18 ottobre 1382, nel Knocktopher, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a St. Canice, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormondが1331年10月4日にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーで生まれた時，父James Butler 1st Earl of Ormondは26歳，母Eleanor de Bohunは26歳であった。1346年5月15日にアイルランドコウントイ オフ ス クロス オフ ティップエラリーでLady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1376年，44歳の時，職業はlord justiceと記録されている。彼は1382年10月18日にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーノクトフエルで51歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニースト. カニスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond(이)가 1331년 10월 4일 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Bohun(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1346년 5월 15일 아일랜드 카운티 프 테 크로스 프 티페라리에서 Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1376년, 44세의 나이로 그의 직업은 lord justice이었다. 그는 1382년 10월 18일 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 노ck토퍼에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이 스트. 캔이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond nasceu em 4 de outubro de 1331, em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, seu pai, James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Bohun, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond em 15 de maio de 1346, em County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1376, com 44 anos, sua profissão aparece como lord justice. Ele faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1382, em Knocktopher, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em St. Canice, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ru.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: коунти оф т кросс оф типпирэри, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond родился 4 октября 1331 г. в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия, его отцу по имени James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Bohun, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond 15 мая 1346 г. в местности коунти оф т кросс оф типпирэри, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1376 году, в возрасте 44 лет,  он работал по профессии lord justice. Он умер 18 октября 1382 г. в местности нокктофир, коунти килкенни, Ирландия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности ст. канаис, килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия.

Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond el 15 de mayo de 1346, en County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1376, a la edad de 44 años, su ocupación registrada era lord justice.
